import { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import axios from "axios"; function Leads() { const [data, setData] = useState({}); const [showDecrypted, setShowDecrypted] = useState(true); const fetchLeads = async (decrypted = true) => { try { const res = await axios.get("http://localhost:8000/leads", { params: { decrypted: decrypted ? 1 : 0 }, }); setData(res.data || {}); } catch (err) { console.error("Error fetching leads:", err); } }; useEffect(() => { fetchLeads(showDecrypted); }, [showDecrypted]); return (
